entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "Gumawa ng heograpiya mga flashcard"

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "Gumawa ng mga flashcard para sa mitosis"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "Gawing Q&Isang talang ito"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Flashcard Builder on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Isang praktikal gabay sa gamit ang Flashcard Builder sa inspir para sa Magsanay ng pag-aaral, kasama ang mga prompt, mga loop sa pag-aaral, at mas ligtas AI mga gawi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Isang mas malakas loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn notes or topics into clear flashcards with answers, traps, and review prompts.
entries.value: AI Flashcard Builder Para sa Aktibong pag-alala ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Gawing mga tala o mga paksa tungo sa malinaw mga flashcard kasama ang mga sagot, traps, at Repasuhin mga prompt.

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: practical guide
entries.value: AI Flashcard Builder Para sa Aktibong pag-alala: praktikal gabay

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small una hakbang rather kaysa isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Ang mga card ay nagtatanong ng isang bagay sa bawat pagkakataon at may kasamang mga bitag upang ang pagrerepaso ay makabuo ng pag-unawa, hindi lang pagkilala.

entries.source: Create recall cards.
entries.value: Gumawa ng recall mga card.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ng pagsusulat ang ideya likod mula sa memory.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Tagabuo ng Flashcard

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Pagsasanay

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Reveal answers when ready.
entries.value: Reveal mga sagot kapag ready.

entries.source: Review misses sooner.
entries.value: Repasuhin misses sooner.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Flashcard Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Memory Palace. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Magsimula ang live mode at Flashcard Builder. Kung ikaw gusto isang neighboring pag-aaral format, subukan Memory Palace. Para sa isang mas malawak view ng ang platform, Basahin ano isang AI katuwang sa pag-aaral dapat gawin para sa lahat.

entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na naghahanda para sa mga pagsusulit, mga nag-aaral ng wika, at sinumang gumagamit ng retrieval practice.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Sabihin sa mode kung ano ang sinusubukan mong matutunan o mabuo.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Na difference shows up sa ang flow. Instead ng isa giant response, ang pinakamahusay mga session lumipat sa pamamagitan ng isang loop: set isang layunin, subukan something, get feedback, repair ang mahina spot, at pumili ang susunod action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Na pokus matters. Isang general chatbot Maaari bang sagot almost anything, pero isang pag-aaral mode gives ang conversation isang shape. Ito nudges ikaw toward ang kind ng thinking, pagsasanay, feedback, o exploration na tumutulong ang ideya stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ito ay ang same gawi behind studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself: keep ang mag-aaral aktibo. AI ay pinaka kapaki-pakinabang kapag ito gives ikaw feedback sa iyong thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ito mode ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa mga mag-aaral sino gusto sa:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Subukan ang hakbang sa iyong own mga salita.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gamitin Flashcard Builder Kapag ikaw gusto isang session na nagsisimula quickly pero pa rin umaangkop sa ikaw. Ang una layunin ay hindi sa tunog impressive. Ang una layunin ay gumawa ang susunod hakbang feel posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Saan nakatutulong ang mode na ito

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Saan susunod

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ikaw Maaari bang also magsimula kasama ang isang magaspang version ng iyong totoo problema. Isang magulo una prompt ay fine. Ang session Maaari bang clarify ang antas, madla, deadline, at estilo once ikaw magsimula.
